title: Audit and classify all repo documentation surfaces
description: Inventory every markdown, agent-instruction, and rule surface and produce documentation/agent-doc-audit.md classifying each as canonical KB, pointer, supplemental, generated artifact, or obsolete.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Audit complete. Inventory and classifications written to documentation/agent-doc-audit.md (top-level repo, plexus/docs, documentation/, docs/, MCP, .claude, skills, .cursor/rules, spikes, per-folder readmes). Defines target layout under documentation/agent/<namespace>/ with namespaced ids and YAML frontmatter standard.
